channel.title: Vs Code on Aaditya Maheshwari
channel.description: Recent content in Vs Code on Aaditya Maheshwari

item.title: My favorite VS Code extensions
item.description: VS Code is great code editor which has some awesome basic features without the need of extensions/plugins than most of the other code editors. Yet there are some extensions that I like using with VS Code to accelerate my productivity, make the editor look even more awesome & linting etc. Better HAML - For Ruby on Rails projects that use HAML. I prefer HAML over html.erb because it is much cleaner & easier to read.

item.title: Visual Studio Code - My favorite code editor
item.description: Everything below about VS Code are my opinions & all about personal preference. Yes! Visual Studio Code (VS Code) is my favorite & to go code editor. I have used Sublime Text & Atom too. I was great fan of Atom until I used VS Code. I have been using VS Code for almost a year now. I recently did give Atom (Version 1.23.3) a try again but there was still a huge performance difference when compared to VS Code.
